text: I feel the hush of anticipation in the first space—its silence and minimalism inspire contemplation, as if every empty seat and beanbag holds the presence of potential conversation yet to unfold. In the second space, surrounded by the vivid colors and words of an exhibit, my curiosity wakes up and I wonder about the complicated dance between humans and machines. Here, I feel inquisitive and a little humbled by the momentum of innovation on display.
